title: WispSMP
description:
A plugin inspired by the Wisp SMP, remade by @lusik_2155 (Texturepack in description)
Original Wisp SMP made by @notyourlucid.
body:
> **Disclaimer:** This is an unofficial remake of the WispSMP plugin concept. I am not affiliated with the original WispSMP server or team. This plugin is a fan-made recreation and I do not claim any credit for the original gameplay concept.

# ❤️ WispSMP
Players start with a set number of lives. Each death removes one life. If you hit zero lives, you switch to spectator mode unless revived with the Eye of Revival.

[![This Could Be Your Ad](https://i.imgur.com/JTJ56Wb.png)](https://discord.gg/lusik)

# 🔹Features

- **Visual Lives System**
  Custom heart indicators appear in player nametags. They show how many lives a player has left. Hearts update in real time.

- **Spectator on Death**
  A player with zero lives switches to spectator mode. No respawn. They watch the world without interaction.

- **Eye of Revival**
  Players revive eliminated players with the Eye of Revival. The Eye comes from a pedestal ritual. A revived player returns with full lives.

---

## Commands & Permissions

| Command              | Permission       | Description                          |
| -------------------- | ---------------- | ------------------------------------ |
| /revive <player>     | wispsmp.revive   | Revive a dead player with full lives |
| /pedestal            | wispsmp.pedestal | Spawn the pedestal                   |
| /pedestal deactivate | wispsmp.pedestal | Remove the pedestal                  |

Aliases: /res, /restore

---

## How It Works

1. **New players join** → Get configured lives (default 3)
2. **Player dies** → Loses one life, hearts update
3. **Out of lives** → Becomes permanent spectator
4. **Revival** → Use the Eye of Revival at the pedestal to restore a player’s full lives

---

![Eye of Revival Pedestal ritual demonstration](https://i.imgur.com/zPXhKG4.gif)
